meaning: n.(一种表面光洁如玻璃的)炼砖,渣块v.(使)炼成渣
examples: The higher operating costs can be offset against the cement clinker.
Therefore, new technology of using acetylene sludge to calcine clinker will be discussed in this article.
She was shaking the clinker out of the range so that the fire would glow.
"The real clinker here is good old-fashioned human behavior, " says Shaheen, who is sitting on 15 million underwater options.
